items.name: Client-Server-Authentication-Framework
items.description: This is a secure client-server authentication framework featuring a C-based server and Python CLI client. It implements SHA-512 password hashing, secure session tokens, rate limiting, and account lockouts. Designed for educational purposes, it demonstrates best practices in secure network programming and cross-language communication.
